topic_words: ['greenhouse gas', 'soil moisture', 'convective precipitation', 'reanalysis data', 'climate model projections']
authors: Yinghao Fu;Haishen Lü;Ali Levent Yagci;Yonghua Zhu;Yingying Xu;Tingxing Chen;Jiaying Liu;Yiding Ding;Di Liu;Long Xiang
title: Land-atmosphere feedbacks and anthropogenic greenhouse gas forcing intensify subseasonal drought-to-pluvial abrupt transitions
abstract:
Abrupt transitions from drought to extreme precipitation occur more often under higher atmospheric greenhouse gas levels, and are favored through the influence of soil moisture deficits on convective precipitation, revealed by a global assessment based on reanalysis data and climate model projections. 
 Abrupt transitions from drought to pluvial conditions are increasingly reported and pose substantial risks to global hydrological stability. However, their occurrence patterns, underlying mechanisms, and future trajectories remain insufficiently understood. Here, we develop a soil moisture-precipitation index to identify such subseasonal transitions using global reanalysis data and climate model projections. Globally, events occur with an average probability of about 45%, exceeding the theoretical expectation under random conditions, and are most frequent in mid-latitude monsoon regions, including South Asia, Central Europe, and the Mediterranean. Moreover, soil moisture deficits at the end of drought enhance the likelihood of strong convective precipitation by intensifying near-surface heating and atmospheric moisture convergence, especially in energy-limited climates. Under a high-emissions future, both event frequency and probability increase across more than three-quarters of global land. Greenhouse gas forcing accounts for most of the projected increases, highlighting growing risks from compound hydroclimatic extremes. Abrupt transitions from drought to extreme precipitation occur more often under higher atmospheric greenhouse gas levels, and are favored through the influence of soil moisture deficits on convective precipitation, revealed by a global assessment based on reanalysis data and climate model projections.

explanation: 该论文使用卫星数据评估森林管理计划对森林损失的影响，涉及卫星观测技术和森林覆盖分析，与大气环境遥感技术中的卫星观测和森林动态监测相关。
topic_words: ['satellite-derived forest change data', 'administrative concession records', 'forest management plans']
authors: Kenneth Houngbedji;Marc Bouvier;Antoine Leblois;Jean-Sylvestre Makak;Benoit Mertens
title: Forest management plan validation gradually reduces forest loss in Congo Basin concessions
abstract:
Validated forest management plans cut forest loss by 47% in Congo Basin concessions, with reductions emerging gradually and persisting for up to 19 years across five countries, based on two decades of counterfactual analysis. 
 Forest management plans are central to regulations governing logging concessions in the Congo Basin, yet their long-term effectiveness remains uncertain. Here, we combine annual satellite-derived forest change data with administrative concession records and exploit variation in the timing of plan validation across five countries to assess how validation influences forest-cover dynamics from 2000 to 2020 using counterfactual impact-evaluation methods. We find that concessions with validated plans experience a gradual, sustained decline in forest loss, averaging 100  ± 44 hectares per year, equivalent to a 47% reduction relative to concessions operating without validated plans. Effects persist for up to 19 years and occur in concessions with and without independent third-party certification. These results indicate that accelerating the validation and implementation of forest management plans can substantially reduce forest disturbance in the Congo Basin. Validated forest management plans cut forest loss by 47% in Congo Basin concessions, with reductions emerging gradually and persisting for up to 19 years across five countries, based on two decades of counterfactual analysis.

explanation: 这篇论文主要研究的是冰川退缩后释放的微生物及其对陆地和海洋生态系统的影响，虽然涉及环境科学和生态学，但并未直接涉及大气环境遥感技术，如空气质量监测、卫星观测或大气成分分析等。
authors: Keshao Liu;Yongqin Liu;Zhihao Zhang;Xuezi Guo;Hongzhi Qin;Xinshu Zhu;Xuefeng Zhang;Yuying Chen
title: Unique microbes released by retreating glaciers are rarely propagated to coastal ecosystems
abstract:
Metabolically unique glacial microbes dominate foreland communities but rarely persist in fjords, showing limited functional transfer across the land-sea interface, based on genome-resolved metagenomics along a glacier-to-fjord gradient 
 Glacial retreat releases a vast reservoir of microbes into downstream ecosystems, yet the functional consequences of this transfer are unknown. Here we used genome-resolved metagenomics across a Svalbard glacier-foreland-fjord continuum and reconstructed 309 metagenome-assembled genomes (MAGs) to track microbial fate. Glacial taxa dominated foreland soils (75% of MAGs) but were rare in fjord sediments (14%), which hosted endemic marine lineages (83%). Although heterotrophy was ubiquitous, carbon fixation pathways were primarily encoded by glacial MAGs. The foreland was a denitrification hotspot, whereas sulfur oxidation dominated in the fjord. Genomic traits for cryoprotection and complex carbon degradation further distinguished glacial from marine taxa. We conclude that glaciers host functionally distinct microbiota, but strong environmental filtering at the land-sea interface limits functional propagation to marine ecosystems, implying glacier loss may disrupt terrestrial microbial biodiversity and biogeochemistry more profoundly than coastal systems. Metabolically unique glacial microbes dominate foreland communities but rarely persist in fjords, showing limited functional transfer across the land-sea interface, based on genome-resolved metagenomics along a glacier-to-fjord gradient

explanation: 该论文研究了使用Sentinel-2卫星图像进行土壤湿度反演的技术，涉及了大气环境遥感技术中的卫星观测和大气成分分析等方面，因此与大气环境遥感技术密切相关。
authors: Zhe Dong;Micha Silver;Gregory Okin;Arnon Karnieli
title: A fully automated OPTRAM (aOPTRAM) for soil moisture retrieval: Evaluating multiple fitting functions, vegetation indices, land-cover types, and scales
abstract:
•Developed AOPTRAM: adaptive sliding window for soil moisture estimation. •Validated within-situdata from 130 sites using Sentinel-2 observations. •Defined OPTRAM applicability across edge types, indices, and spatial scales. 
 Soil moisture is a key variable in hydrological and climate studies. The Optical Trapezoid Model (OPTRAM) enables high-resolution soil moisture retrieval using only reflective bands, but most implementations still rely on manual edge/parameter selection and have not been systematically evaluated across diverse ecosystems. Here, we integrate an extended Adaptive Sliding Window (ASW) edge-detection algorithm into an automated OPTRAM (aOPTRAM) workflow to assess its performance using Sentinel-2 imagery and in-situ measurements from 10 networks (130 stations) spanning bare soil, shrubland, grassland, and tree cover. We compared vegetation indices (NDVI, SAVI), edge-fitting functions (linear, exponential, polynomial), and spatial scales (network vs. station), and evaluated accuracy using Pearson's correlation coefficient (R), unbiased root-mean-square error (ubRMSE), bias, and Kling-Gupta efficiency (KGE). aOPTRAM performance is sensitive to vegetation index, land cover, edge functional form, and export scale. SAVI with linear edges performs best in shrublands, whereas NDVI with exponential edges is generally preferred in grasslands and tree cover. Bare-soil remains challenging because the STR dynamic range is small, leading to weak wet–dry separability and amplified retrieval uncertainty. Station-scale export consistently improves accuracy relative to the network scale and better captures seasonal soil-moisture dynamics. Overall, aOPTRAM achieves performance comparable to optimal OPTRAM while providing a fast, edge-calibration-free framework for high-resolution soil moisture monitoring across heterogeneous landscapes.

explanation: 该论文主要研究从倾斜摄影测量中提取建筑物的方法，虽然涉及遥感技术（倾斜摄影测量），但其核心内容是计算机视觉和三维建模，而非大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测、卫星观测、大气成分分析、气溶胶反演等）。因此，它与大气环境遥感技术的关联性较弱。
authors: Yi Xie;Junyang Chen;Jun Zhang;Yinfeng Hao;Yangke Ying;Xiangyang Yang;Yong Zhang;Yadi Wang
title: MAFNet: A multi-modal adaptive fusion network-based approach for individual building extraction from oblique photogrammetry
abstract:
•Propose MAFNet, a dual-branch CNN with a fusion module for building extraction. •Design a workflow for automated building monolithization and 3D visualization. •Construct a novel high-resolution oblique photogrammetric building dataset. •Achieve superior performance in building contour extraction and 3D visualization. 
 Oblique photogrammetry is a pivotal technique for generating high-precision 3D urban models. However, the resulting models often exhibit a shell-like, surface-only structure, lacking both physical separation and semantic distinction between individual buildings. This limitation restricts their capacity to support querying, analysis, and attribute management in digital city applications. To address the shortcomings of existing methods in accuracy, efficiency, and automation, this paper proposes a Multi-modal Adaptive Fusion Network (MAFNet). By employing a dual-branch encoder and an innovative Dual-modal Dynamic Feature Fusion (DDFF) module, MAFNet enables effective cross-modal feature interaction, which yields marked improvements in segmentation accuracy and robustness for complex urban scenes. On top of MAFNet, we further design a systematic automated processing workflow that associates the 2D segmentation results with the oblique photogrammetry model via edge detection, contour extraction and simplification, geographic coordinate mapping, and 3D visualization. This framework thus establishes a complete 2D-to-3D monolithization pipeline. To validate the proposed method, we construct an oblique photogrammetry building dataset including 3D models, DOM, DSM, and pixel-level mask annotations. Experimental results show that MAFNet achieves an IoU of 90.75% and an F1 score of 95.08% on this dataset, outperforming state-of-the-art models, thereby demonstrating the method’s efficacy and its strong potential for practical deployment in 3D GIS and digital twin systems.

journal: International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation

explanation: 该论文研究盐湖城长期城市排放趋势，涉及CO、CO2和NOX的浓度变化，这些是大气环境监测的关键污染物。研究使用增强比（ΔNOX:ΔCO2和ΔCO:ΔCO2）评估排放趋势，并与之前的监测数据和排放清单进行比较，这与大气环境遥感技术和空气质量监测密切相关。
authors: Haley Humble;J.C. Lin;D.V. Mallia;C. Harkins;B.C. McDonald;M.A. Garcia;M. Ostlie
title: Long-term urban emission trends in Salt Lake City: Examining CO, CO<sub>2</sub>, and NO<sub>X</sub> enhancements
abstract:
•ΔCO:ΔCO2reductions reflect declining on-road gasoline sources in Salt Lake City. •ΔNOX:ΔCO2reductions were driven by declines in on-road diesel in Salt Lake City. •Long term traffic emission declines shifted relative traffic vs non-traffic shares. 
 This study examines long-term trends (2005–2023) in nitrogen oxides (NOX ≡ NO + NO2), carbon monoxide (CO), and carbon dioxide (CO2) enhancements (Δ = observed concentrations - background) which have been used to isolate local enhancements linked to anthropogenic activity. Nearly two decades of co-located in situ CO2, CO, and NOX measurements offer a unique opportunity to assess emission trends and identify sector-specific changes in Salt Lake City, at the center of a rapidly growing urban region in the Salt Lake Valley. These trends are evaluated using enhancement ratios (ΔNOX:ΔCO2 and ΔCO:ΔCO2), in comparison with previous studies and emission inventories such as Vulcan and FIVE-VCP-NEI17NRT. Both ΔNOX and ΔCO declined steadily over the study period, indicating substantial reductions in their emissions, primarily from the on-road transportation sector. In contrast, long-term ΔCO2 remained relatively stable. The observed long-term stability in ΔCO2 alongside declining ΔNOX and ΔCO emphasizes the utility of enhancement ratios as robust indicators of urban anthropogenic emission sources. Statistically significant decreases in ΔNOX:ΔCO2 and ΔCO:ΔCO2 ratios further suggest sustained reductions in NOX and CO emissions. However, the rate of decline in these enhancement ratios slowed over time, pointing to a deceleration in emission reductions. A convergence in weekday and weekend ΔNOX:ΔCO2 and ΔCO:ΔCO2 ratios was also observed, likely reflecting evolving contributions from non-traffic sources relative to on-road emissions, and possibly influenced by on-road diesel emission controls. Following the COVID-19 shutdown, all sites exhibited marked and sustained declines in enhancement ratios, reflecting lasting shifts in traffic behavior and reduced emissions across multiple sectors, including industrial and ‘other’ sources (e.g., agriculture, commercial, residential, railway, airport). Notably, a sharp post-shutdown (2021-2023) decrease (∼25%) in ΔCO2 from on-road gasoline, on-road diesel, and the ‘other’ sectors contributions was observed.

explanation: 该论文研究了东亚和东南亚地区活性氮沉降的变化模式，使用了机器学习方法进行分析，这与大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测、大气成分分析）密切相关。
authors: Jiani Tan;Yan Zhang;Xuejun Liu;Yun Fat LAM;Mohd Talib Latif;Kasemsan Manomaiphiboon;Joshua S. Fu;Maggie Chel Gee Ooi;Ling Huang;Yangjun Wang;Hui Chen;Kun Zhang;Qing Mu;Li Li
title: Data driven analysis on changing patterns of reactive nitrogen deposition in East and Southeast Asia
abstract:
•Reactive nitrogen deposition trends (2000-2020) in East and Southeast Asia were studied by ensemble machine learning. •East Asia's depositions align with anthropogenic emission changes, with a downwards trend in ammonium-to-nitrate ratio. •Southeast Asia's deposition trends are strongly modulated by precipitation. 
 East Asia (EA) and Southeast Asia (SEA) are global hotspots for reactive nitrogen (Nr) deposition, accounting for 38% of the world's nitrogen inputs, yet sparse ground observations and biases in chemical transport models (CTMs) have hindered accurate impact assessments. Here, we leveraged an ensemble machine learning framework, integrating random forest, gradient boosting trees, and neural networks, to develop data-driven analyses for wet and dry Nr depositions. Rigorous evaluation using 10-fold cross-validation and independent testing shows that our machine learning estimates outperform CTM-based results. Based on independent testing (R = 0.74 for wet NOᵧ, 0.76 for wet NHx, 0.85 for dry NOᵧ, 0.75 for dry NHx), our model improves prediction accuracy by 54.0% for wet NOᵧ, 65.0% for wet NHx, and 26.0% for dry NHx compared with CTM-based independent test results. Gridded maps (0.25° × 0.25° resolution) show that total Nr depositions in EA and SEA were 36.3–39.0 Tg N yr−1 during 2000–2020, with wet deposition accounting for 58% and reduced nitrogen (NHx) comprising 62% of total loads. Analyses of spatiotemporal distributions reveal that EA's depositions align with anthropogenic emission changes, with its wet deposition ammonium-to-nitrate ratio exhibited a downward trend over the period, while SEA's trends are strongly modulated by precipitation. These findings provide a robust scientific foundation for integrating Nr management strategies with climate resilience planning via deposition, enabling targeted interventions to address dual challenges of air quality protection and carbon neutrality goals in these rapidly developing regions.

explanation: 该论文研究了一种改进的近源空气污染物监测方法，使用极坐标网格的非参数轨迹分析技术来评估不同局部源区对测量的空气污染物的影响。研究涉及NOx、BC和PM2.5等空气污染物数据，这与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测、大气成分分析等领域密切相关。
authors: Janet Burke;Ronald Henry;Will Wetherell;Jim Brunnert
title: Polar grid-based nonparametric trajectory analysis for improved near-source air pollutant monitoring applications
abstract:
•Created polar grid-based version of Nonparametric Trajectory Analysis (Polar NTA). •Estimates relative impact of different local source areas on measured air pollutants. •Applied to NOx, BC, and PM2.5 data from near-road monitoring site. •Contributions highest near major roadway for traffic-related air pollutants. •Polar NTA provides enhanced resolution for near-source air monitoring. 
 Nonparametric Trajectory Analysis (NTA) combines continuous air pollutant concentrations with local-scale back trajectories estimated from wind speed and direction to quantify source area impacts at a monitoring site. Previously, NTA calculations used regular grid spacing and kernel smoothing which limited the spatial variability in NTA maps around monitoring sites located near sources. NTA was modified to be based on a polar grid to produce finer resolution close to the site. Polar NTA results were compared to the previous version using one year of continuous data from a near-road monitoring network site in St. Louis, MO.Measurements of wind speed and direction showed that how often and for how long the monitoring site was downwind of the roadway was highly variable, as were concentrations of nitrogen oxides (NOx), black carbon (BC) and particulate matter less than 2.5 μm (PM2.5), but PM2.5 remained elevated or lower for longer periods. Background subtracted PM2.5 was estimated from PM2.5 and had diurnal variability similar to the traffic related air pollutants.Polar NTA results indicated impacts from the roadway, with areas closest to the roadway contributing the highest average concentrations (1.4 μg/m3 for BC and 39 ppb for NOx). Results for background subtracted PM2.5 were similar but indicated additional contributions from nearby point sources. Polar NTA increased maximum estimated contributions by 22% for BC and 39% for NOx. Comparison of results for multiple air pollutants demonstrated the utility of Polar NTA for understanding relative impacts of different sources on local air quality in near-source monitoring applications.

explanation: 该论文研究 hailstorms（冰雹风暴）的雷达检测和微物理特性，涉及雷达技术在气象观测中的应用，与大气环境遥感技术（如气象雷达监测）密切相关。
authors: Qing Li;Yali Luo;Hui Wang;Chong Wu;Shiyi Wang
title: Hailstorms in Weining (Yunnan–Guizhou Plateau): Radar-derived convective features, hail indication, and pre/post-hailfall drop size distributions
abstract:
•The hailstones are small-to-medium sized with low density from pulse-like storms. •Radar-derived MESH outperforms HDRand DVIL in hail indication despite size bias. •Pre- and post-hailfall raindrop spectra show distinct microphysical transitions. 
 Hail adversely impacts crops on the Yunnan–Guizhou Plateau in southwestern China. Radar plays a critical role in hailstorm detection, but radar-based statistical analyses of hailstorms on plateaus remain insufficient. Using integrated observations from March to August 2022–2024 in Weining (eastern Yunnan–Guizhou Plateau, mean elevation 2.2 km), this study examines hail size and density, radar-derived convective characteristics, hailfall indicators, and changes in near-surface raindrop size distribution before (≈ 5–12 min) and during/after (≈ 12 min) hailfall. Results show that 172 hailfall events were dominated by small-to-medium hailstones (diameter < 20 mm) with relatively low density (an average of 109 hailstones m−2), and most events occurred in the afternoon. The hailstorms exhibited pulse-like, meso-γ-scale characteristics, with rapid development after convection initiation. About 70% of events had 35 dBZ echo tops exceeding 9 km, indicating strong convective intensity. The maximum expected size of hail (MESH) outperformed hail differential reflectivity (HDR) and vertically integrated liquid water content (VIL) density in indicating hailfall, achieving a probability of detection of 64%–74% and a false alarm ratio of 13%–23% at a 4–6 mm threshold. For four collocated disdrometer–Micro Rain Radar cases, surface rain rate increased prior to hailfall, with drop breakup dominating below 1 km above ground level. In contrast, during and after hailfall, enhanced collision–coalescence reduced small drops and increased the proportion of larger surface drops.

explanation: 该论文关注中国夏季高温特征和预测，利用气象学夏季温度阈值进行研究，这与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测和温度分析密切相关。

title: Beyond JJA: Heatwave characteristics and projections in China using meteorological summer–based temperature thresholds

explanation: 该论文研究了海洋异戊二烯的起源、分布、海-气通量及其环境影响，涉及大气化学、二次有机气溶胶和臭氧的形成，与大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测、大气成分分析）密切相关。
authors: Xiaoyu Yu;Xiangyi Yang;Ying Lu;Yee Jun Tham;Shichun Zou;Xuemei Wang;Zhenhao Ling
title: The origins and environmental effects of marine isoprene: a review of its distributions and sea-air fluxes
abstract:
•The levels of marine isoprene and their spatiotemporal variations are reviewed. •The sources of marine isoprene and their influencing factors were summarized. •Integrated review on emissions of marine isoprene to the atmosphere and their atmospheric effects are provided. •Prospective directions for future studies on marine isoprene are suggested. 
 Isoprene (C5H8) is a reactive volatile organic compound. In addition to terrestrial vegetation, ocean is a critical source of atmospheric isoprene, particularly in the marine atmospheric environments. Therefore, isoprene plays important roles in the atmospheric chemistry over the marine atmospheric environments by acting as a sink for the OH radical, contributing to the formation of organic aerosols and O3, as well as new particle formation. This paper reviews the main studies on the abundance, distributions and origins of atmospheric isoprene, as well as their impact factors over different marine environments. This paper also provides an integrated literature review on the determination for the sea-air fluxes of isoprene, the quantitative analysis of the contributions of oceanic emissions to the atmospheric abundance of isoprene as well as the evaluation of its contributions to the formation of secondary organic aerosols and ozone, formation through different parameterization methods and numerical simulation over the marine environments. Finally, based on the above summarized scientific findings, the future perspectives of marine isoprene studies are suggested.
